steps.title: Find the trial relationship
steps.content: The passage says randomized clinical trials sometimes fail to do something to conclusions based on real-world observations. The next sentence explains that those observations may overlook confounding variables, so trial evidence may not confirm them.

steps.title: Choose the support word
steps.content: A means put into action, B means avoid, and D means spread widely; none fits the relationship between evidence and conclusions. The needed word means confirm or support. The answer is C.
